title: schedonorus pumilus
intro: Schedonorus pumilus, also known as Little Broom Grass or Small Brome, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly containing sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schedonorus pumilus include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and potentially treating certain types of cancer. In traditional herbal medicine, Schedonorus pumilus is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
